code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut total = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut done = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i < n and not done
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if total + current > 100
          done = true
        else
          total = total + current
          current = 0
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_num and not done
    if total + current <= 100
      total = total + current
    end
  end

  println("total=#{total}")
end
